title: Tax base; computation in case of new business
doc_html:
§843.  Tax base; computation in case of new business

The annual premiums referred to in this Part shall be the gross amount of direct premiums, excluding premiums on annuity contracts, for the preceding year less return premiums without any deductions for dividends paid or otherwise credited to policyholders, and without consideration for reinsurance.

Acts 1958, No. 125.  Amended by Acts 1982, No. 868, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1982; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1066 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.

NOTE:  Former R.S. 22:843 redesignated as R.S. 22:583 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
